heading_content_part: This privacy policy governs your use of the software applicationChallenger Comics Viewer(andChallenger Comics Viewer Donation) for mobile devices that was created by The Challenger.
The Application is a comics reader application which supports local files (internal memory) and network files (stored on network server or on cloud).The app does not explicitly collect or use any
confidential information. It does however find all
Google accounts available on device (using account manager andandroid.permission.GET_ACCOUNTSpermission). These data are only use to allow user to have an access to Google Drive
cloud storage functionality (only used locally by the app). As stated above, this data does not get processed or used or send to any
third parties in any way.By using the Application, you are consenting to this
Privacy Policy now and as amended by us. If you have any questions regarding privacy while using the Application, or have questions about our practices, please
